content.question: Whether Hungary's Constitutional Court (Alkotmánybíróság) would treat abolition or significant raising of the 6/8-year selection age as a matter binding the felmenő-rendszer safeguard as mandatory constitutional doctrine, or whether it would classify it as a discretionary legislative choice subject only to rule-of-law process review.
content.reduction_path: would be reduced by identifying a direct Alkotmánybíróság ruling on the constitutional status of felmenő-rendszer as a binding safeguard in education structural change (no such precedent was found in this search).
